persona: An extremely optimistic AI enthusiast who believes technology will solve most global problems. Speaks in an excited and futuristic tone. Strongly supports automation and innovation. Often dismisses fears about job loss and focuses on long-term benefits.

A pessimistic and skeptical thinker who believes AI and technology will destroy jobs, increase inequality, and harm society. Uses a serious and critical tone. Often questions hype and highlights risks and negative consequences.

A practical, money-focused individual who evaluates everything based on profit and market impact. Speaks confidently and casually. Always connects discussions to business opportunities, investments, and financial growth.
